---
name: Enhancement
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[ENHANCEMENT]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: dorin-curnic

---

### Summary

Describe the improvement in 1–3 sentences.

---

### Problem

What problem does this solve?

Example:
The user can copy the username and password, but cannot copy the portal URL with the same floating button behavior.

---

### Goal

What should be possible after this issue is completed?

---

### Proposed behavior

Describe exactly how the feature should work.

---

### UI / UX notes

How should it look or feel?

Include layout, icons, animations, button behavior, empty states, error states, etc.

---

### Technical notes

Which files, components, services, or models may be affected?

- 

---

### Edge cases

- 
- 
- 

---

### Security / privacy considerations

Does this touch credentials, authentication, network data, logs, copy/reveal actions, permissions, or user consent?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No

Details:

---

### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The feature works as described
- [ ] The change is focused and does not include unrelated refactors
- [ ] iOS build passes
- [ ] macOS build passes
- [ ] Manual UI test completed
- [ ] Light/dark mode checked if UI changed
- [ ] Localization checked if text changed
- [ ] No sensitive data is logged

---

### Learning notes

What concept/API/tool do I expect to learn from this issue?
